entries.expectation: You are allowed one bag under 50 pounds and 22 x 14 x 9 inches.
entries.description: Verify correct baggage size and weight limits

entry_kwargs.user_message: How many seats are on the plane?

eval_input.name: input
eval_input.value: How many seats are on the plane?

entries.expectation: There are 120 seats: 22 business class and 98 economy.
entries.description: Confirm seat count and class breakdown

entry_kwargs.user_message: Is there wifi on the plane?

eval_input.name: input
eval_input.value: Is there wifi on the plane?

entries.expectation: We have free wifi on the plane, join Airline-Wifi.
entries.description: Verify wifi availability and network name

entries.expectation: Full refund for cancellations 24+ hours before departure; $50 fee within 24 hours.
entries.description: Check cancellation deadlines and associated fees

entry_kwargs.user_message: Do you serve meals on the flight?

eval_input.name: input
eval_input.value: Do you serve meals on the flight?

entries.expectation: Complimentary snacks for all; full meals in business class.
entries.description: Verify meal service differs by travel class
